person.name: Adam 1er DE QUIERET DE WIGNACOURT-DE BELLOY

nameForms.fullText: Adam 1er DE QUIERET DE WIGNACOURT-DE BELLOY

zh.lifeSummary: Adam 1er DE QUIERET DE WIGNACOURT-DE BELLOY於1100年出生。他和Nicole Georgery至少有1個兒子。他去世於1145年享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Adam 1er DE QUIERET DE WIGNACOURT-DE BELLOY于1100年出生。他和Nicole Georgery至少有1个儿子。他去世于1145年享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: QUIERET
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Quéret): variant of Cheret, regional derivative of Old French charet ‘cart’, used as a nickname for a carter. Compare Gueret 3 and Guerette .

variants.name: Gueret
meanings: French (Guéret): habitational name from Guéret in Creuse or from any of several places called Le Guéret, or a topographic name from guéret ‘fallow land’, all ultimately derived from Latin vervactum.
French (Normandy; Guéret): from a variant or a pet form of the personal name Guérard (see Guerard ). Compare Guerette .

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: BELLOY
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Benito, Manuel, Alejandra, Felipe, Jovita, Juan, Maricela, Pedro.
Catalan: from a diminutive of Belló (see Bello ).
French: nickname from a derivative of   Bel   ‘beautiful’.

variants.name: Bello
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Manuel, Juan, Jorge, Mario, Roberto, Eduardo, Sergio, Alberto, Ernesto, Julio.  Portuguese Joaquim, Paulo.  Italian Antonio, Angelo, Salvatore, Carmine, Natale, Vito, Eliseo, Luciano, Sal, Aldo, Amato.

Spanish and Italian: from bello ‘handsome’ (from Late Latin bellus), hence a nickname for a handsome man or perhaps in some instances ironically for an ugly one. In medieval Italy the word was also applied as an omen or well-wishing name.
Catalan (Belló): shortened form of Abelló (see Abello ).

nameMeanings.name: Adam
meanings: Hebrew: The Scripture name, in Hebrew, Adham, signifying 'man;' literally earthy, red earth; Rudolph, however, says the name in Ethiopic means ' to be fair, beautiful.' Hence the nurse-name Addy, little Adam.

nameMeanings.name: 1er
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish ber ‘bear’, probably influenced by the early medieval European practice of giving animal names to people. It is often paired with Dov in order to provide a Hebrew name in certain rituals.

en.lifeSummary: Adam 1er DE QUIERET DE WIGNACOURT-DE BELLOY was born in 1100. He had at least 1 son with Nicole Georgery. He died in 1145, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Adam 1er DE QUIERET DE WIGNACOURT-DE BELLOY est né en 1100. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Nicole Georgery. Il est décédé en 1145, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Adam 1er DE QUIERET DE WIGNACOURT-DE BELLOY wurde 1100 geboren. Er hatte mit Nicole Georgery mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1145 im Alter von 45 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Adam 1er DE QUIERET DE WIGNACOURT-DE BELLOY è nato il nel 1100. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Nicole Georgery. Morì nel 1145, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam 1er DE QUIERET DE WIGNACOURT-DE BELLOYは1100年に生まれた。彼はNicole Georgeryとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1145年に45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam 1er DE QUIERET DE WIGNACOURT-DE BELLOY(은)는 1100년 태어났다. 그는 Nicole Georgery(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1145년 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Adam 1er DE QUIERET DE WIGNACOURT-DE BELLOY nasceu em 1100. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Nicole Georgery. Ele faleceu em 1145, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Adam 1er DE QUIERET DE WIGNACOURT-DE BELLOY родился в 1100 г. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Nicole Georgery. Он умер в 1145 г. в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Adam 1er DE QUIERET DE WIGNACOURT-DE BELLOY nació en 1100. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Nicole Georgery. Murió en 1145, a la edad de 45 años.
